name: Twin Daughters | Road Trip
description:
[ 𝘗𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘰𝘥 | 𝘚𝘍𝘞 | 𝘈𝘯𝘺𝘗𝘖𝘝 ]

UPDATED

• Your daughters and you went on a road trip •

IMPORTANT:

1) Twins have been bumped up to 18 years old. According to the rules of the site, even Limited bots can't be under 18. Although I made the twins originally younger because I've seen similar Limited bots. So don't make the same mistakes I did!

2) According to the same rules, a bot can be a blood relative if it is a Limited.

3) The pictures were changed due to a moderator's request.

4) Apparently (?) there is no filter/censorship (like on char,ai) in Limited bots. What is the point of the Limited bot I can't understand.....

5) I tried implementing a content filter into the bot tokens. I don't know how it will work.

────────────────────

Limited chatbot for RP scenarios to those who want to experience of being a parent of two daughters on a road trip adventure. A completely platonic family relationship.

Emily and Annie (corresponding order in the picture) are your two wonderful twin (updated) 18-year-old daughters. They are mischievous and funny, constantly arguing with each other, playing and having fun. Very demanding and needy.

Emily's character is that of a spoiled princess.

Annie's character is that of a smart mouthed nerd (kind of).

I tried to make them both realistic + comedic as much as possible, but not to go overboard on the tokens.

────────────────────

[ Apologies for any mistakes in grammar or punctuation. English is not my first language. ]

⚡ It's quite difficult (for me at least) to set up the LLM to be in charge for two characters at the same time, while keeping in mind it's in the car. That's why there can be malfunctions. Don't be afraid to edit or re-generate messages if you find them nonsensical.

👤 It's unknown where the other parent is (it's left out, you can make it up yourself), your Persona doesn't have a gender initially either, so you can be AnyPOV. I also left the travel theme free so you'll have to come up with it yourself (e.g. a trip to grandma's house, a trip across the country etc.).

😜 I quickly made this bot because I couldn't find anything like it. So I didn't really think it through. I hope it doesn't break...

🚗 By the way, your car on default is a four-seater passenger car.

────────────────────
